subject: Re: Letter for His Excellency Ehud Barak, from MyronBrilliant.pdf
Re: Letter for His Excellency Ehud Barak, from MyronBrilliant.pdf
body:
Hi Jeff
We are in SF. Like to talk to you later. Hope you're well. 
Pl look into the att. Letter 
Does it make sense to join this Body. 
I'll pass to you later names of board members. 
Best
EB
body_html:
Hi Jeff
We are in SF. Like to talk to you later. Hope you're well.
Pl look into the att. Letter
Does it make sense to join this Body.
I'll pass to you later names of board members.
